iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Day 20 auto - % (up). Day 20 — IMMINENT. Unrelenting escalation. Israel kills intelligence minister Khatib (3rd senior official in 2 days). top_signals: 🚨 IRGC fires multiple-warhead/cluster missiles at Israel — first West Bank fatalities from Iran war
💰 Pentagon requests $200B in Iran war funding — Congress confrontation looming
💀 Israel kills 3rd senior Iranian official (Intelligence Minister Khatib) in 48 hours — decapitation campaign continues
⛽ Oil surges past $108/bbl (+50% since war start) — US eases Venezuela sanctions to compensate
☢️ Gabbard confirms IC: Iran enrichment was 'obliterated' — contradicts war justification narrative
🚨 Houthis claim 28 drone strikes across Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, Jordan — proxy war expanding
🕊️ Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire begins (Mar 18-23) — first pause, triggered by deadliest hospital strike
🚢 Hormuz easing: ship traffic nearly doubled — Iran enforces selective blockade only (US/Israel banned)

new: russia_ukraine: trump_deal_stalling (weight 3) — Kremlin says peace process fizzling as Trump focused on Iran
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: SIGNAL: ~90 ships still crossing Hormuz per AP — blockade is selective (US/Israeli ships banned only), not total closure. Iran easing on non-aligned nations. Putin-Trump call today yielded no Ukraine breakthrough. Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire active Mar 18-23. ME military escalation continues with IRGC announcing Gulf energy infrastructure attacks.

latest_news.headline: Israeli strikes across Lebanon kill 20+, hit central Beirut and Litani bridges
latest_news.text: Wave of Israeli strikes kills 20+ across Lebanon. Central Beirut (Bashoura) hit. Litani River bridges destroyed to cut Hezbollah supply lines. Al-Manar TV director killed in Beirut strike. Sidon paramedic killed. 960+ total dead in Lebanon.

latest_news.headline: Oil hits $110 Brent as Iran vows to escalate in 'new ways'
latest_news.text: Brent crude at ~$110/barrel, up 80% since war start. Iran vows escalation in 'new ways.' Germany's Merz criticizes US strikes, refuses Hormuz naval deployment. South Pars gas field damage ongoing.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire confirmed, active through Mar 23
latest_news.source: Al Jazeera / Le Monde / The Hindu
latest_news.text: Eid ceasefire active midnight Mar 18/23. Pakistan agrees 'in good faith'; Taliban says defense is 'national obligation.' Operations to resume 'with renewed intensity' after Eid.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 24, 00:04 UTC) — (1) Israel-Lebanon: 20+ killed in Wed strikes, central Beirut hit, Litani bridges destroyed, 960+ dead total; (2) Iran vows escalation in 'new ways,' oil at $110 Brent (+80%); (3) South Pars damage ongoing; (4) Germany refuses Hormuz deployment; (5) Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire active (Mar 18-23); (6) No ceasefire signals in ME active theaters; (7) Russia-Ukraine: stable, no new developments; (8) DPRK/India/China/Turkey: quiet.
